/usr/bin/c++ -std=c++11 -rdynamic CMakeFiles/financeSimulation.dir/FinanceSimulation.cpp.o -o financeSimulation  libMain.a Agent/libAgent.a Algorithms/libAlgorithms.a DataCollector/libDataCollector.a ExcessDemandCalculator/libExcessDemandCalculator.a NeighbourhoodGenerator/libNeighbourhoodGenerator.a Input/libInput.a PriceCalculator/libPriceCalculator.a QuantitiesOfInterest/libQuantitiesOfInterest.a RandomGenerator/libRandomGenerator.a StockExchange/libStockExchange.a Switching/libSwitching.a VariableContainer/libVariableContainer.a Writer/libWriter.a ../libs/tinyxml2/libtinyxml2.a Version/libVersion.a ../libs/progressbar/lib/libprogressbar.a -lcurses -lform DataCollector/libDataCollector.a Group/libGroup.a
